title: Reference Assistance
wikitext:
[]: Reference Assistance             Quote Post by Dan » Tue May 01, 2007 4:45 pm I would like to use of of the "What we are trying to make here" statement for a thesis I am working on, but have a few questions about it. It says it is from Eva Vol. 1, but does that refer to the anime or comic? Do you know the translator of the statement? (this could be easy if it is in the english comic printing) Thanks much

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue May 01, 2007 4:50 pm The statement was published in the English manga vol.1; but refers to the anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Dan » Tue May 01, 2007 4:54 pm Thanks, thats very helpful

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 01, 2007 6:29 pm I don't have the sparkly new edition of vol.1 that Viz put out, but the original (published in 1998) ascribes translation to a Mari Morimoto.

[]:             Quote Post by Dan » Tue May 01, 2007 6:33 pm Huh. I don't have mine with me at the moment so I can't check, but is she listed as the translator of the entire volume? Thanks for the extra info, too.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue May 01, 2007 7:17 pm Reichu wrote: I don't have the sparkly new edition of vol.1 that Viz put out, but the original (published in 1998) ascribes translation to a Mari Morimoto.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 01, 2007 7:50 pm Dan wrote: Huh. I don't have mine with me at the moment so I can't check, but is she listed as the translator of the entire volume?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue May 01, 2007 7:58 pm Reichu wrote: But I was just talking about the original.
